acmpca.certificate.validity.CfnAbout: Length of time for which the certificate issued by your private certificate authority (CA), or by the private CA itself, is valid in days, months, or years. You can issue a certificate by calling the `IssueCertificate` operation.

acmpca.certificate.validity.Type.Description: Specifies whether the `Value` parameter represents days, months, or years.

acmpca.certificate.validity.Value.Description: A long integer interpreted according to the value of `Type`, below.
